claims.headline: Lowers stress & cortisol
claims.notesSentence: Significant reductions in serum cortisol and perceived stress vs. placebo in a 60-day double-blind RCT using a high-concentration root extract.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Ashwagandha cortisol and stress RCT on PubMed

claims.headline: Eases anxiety in healthy adults
claims.notesSentence: Adaptogenic and anxiolytic effects in a randomized study of healthy adults supplementing with KSM-66.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Ashwagandha KSM-66 anxiety study on PubMed
